text.title: Design Docs Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Design Docs Patterns. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: pick-format
step.action: Select Google-lite | 6-pager | RFC | ERD per design-docs-big-tech.

step.name: draft-required-sections
step.action: Populate context / goals / non-goals / proposed / alternatives / open-questions.

step.name: extract-adrs
step.action: Pull each significant decision into an ADR.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
